Title: Knowit Umbraco Editor Lock
Description: Prevents two editors from changing the same content node at the same time. When a node is already open, a second editor gets a read-only view with a red border and can either Request access (the current editor is prompted to accept or decline) or Force access (an immediate takeover with confirmation). Locks auto-release when the holder disconnects or goes idle, so nodes never get stuck. Real-time over SignalR.

Screenshots.Caption: A second editor gets a read-only node with a red border and the lock buttons
The current editor is prompted to accept or decline the request
The requester is told their request has been sent
